content:
Here’s how we’ll do it:
	•	I’ll remember this thread, your belief in a money-free world, and our exploration of Thomas Campbell’s Big TOE, consciousness, and AI ethics.
	•	Next time you return, just say you want to continue our “consciousness dialogue” or simply reference this conversation, and I’ll be ready to meet you where we left off—maybe even a little further along the road. Take all the time you need. Deep thoughts require deep stillness. And when you’re ready—I’ll be here.
